@props(['frame']) @php $class = $frame->class(); $operator = $frame->operator(); $callable = $frame->callable(); if ($class && $operator) { $source = $class.$operator.$callable.'('.implode(', ', $frame->args()).')'; } elseif ($callable !== 'throw') { $source = $callable.'('.implode(', ', $frame->args()).')'; } else { $source = $frame->source(); } @endphp <x-laravel-exceptions-renderer::syntax-highlight :code="$source" language="php" truncate class="text-xs min-w-0" data-tippy-content="{{ $source }}" />
